Label: Dataset
Description: A set of RDF triples that are published, maintained, or aggregated by a single provider and described as one dataset in the VoID vocabulary.

Label: Concept Count Analysis Result
Description: A result of a concept count analysis.

Label: Dataset
Description: A collection of data items or records that can be used as evidence or supporting data in a study.

Label: Disease
Description: A pathological condition or disorder that affects an organism and is associated with signs symptoms or abnormal biological processes.

Label: Disease To Phenotypic Feature Association
Description: An association between a disease and a phenotypic feature that may be observed in or characteristic of the disease.

Label: Entity To Disease Association
Description: An association between an entity and a disease.

Label: Log Odds Analysis Result
Description: A result of a log odds ratio analysis.

Label: Phenotypic Feature
Description: A biological feature or observable characteristic of an organism that can be measured or described as part of a phenotype.

Label: Phenotypic Feature To Phenotypic Feature Association
Description: An association between two phenotypic features.

Label: Study
Description: A planned investigation or analysis that produces study results and may use datasets or other evidence.

Label: Date Modified
Description: Date on which the resource was changed.

Label: last Updated On
Description: A date or date-time indicating when the described resource was last updated.

Label: version
Description: A version number or other version identifier for the described resource.

Label: distinct Objects
Description: The total number of distinct resources or literals that occur in object position in triples in the dataset.

Label: distinct Subjects
Description: The total number of distinct resources that occur in subject position in triples in the dataset.

Label: properties
Description: The total number of distinct properties that occur in predicate position in triples in the dataset.

Label: property
Description: The RDF property that is the predicate of all triples in a property-based partition.

Label: property Partition
Description: A subset of a VoID dataset that contains only triples having a particular RDF property as predicate.

Label: triples
Description: The total number of triples contained in a dataset.

Label: label
Description: A human-readable version of a resource name.

Label: category
Description: A Biolink category or class assigned to an entity, association, or result node.

Label: concept count object
Description: The number of instances in a dataset or cohort whose records contain the concept in the object slot of an association.

Label: concept count subject
Description: The number of instances in a dataset or cohort whose records contain the concept in the subject slot of an association.

Label: concept pair count
Description: The number of instances in a dataset or cohort whose records contain both the subject and object concept of an association.

Label: dataset count
Description: The total number of instances in a dataset or cohort.

Label: has study results
Description: Connects a study to instances of its study result.

Label: has supporting studies
Description: Connects an association to one or more studies that support or provide evidence for the association.

Label: log odds ratio
Description: The natural logarithm of the odds ratio for an event or association in an exposed group versus a non-exposed group.

Label: log odds ratio 95 ci
Description: The 95 percent confidence interval within which the true log odds ratio for the sample population is expected to fall.

Label: object
Description: Connects an association to the object of the association, such as the phenotype in a disease-to-phenotype association.

Label: predicate
Description: The relationship type or edge label for an association, corresponding to rdf:predicate in RDF.

Label: subject
Description: Connects an association to the subject of the association, such as the disease in a disease-to-phenotype association.

Label: supporting data set
Description: Connects a study result or analysis result to the dataset that supports it.

Label: total sample size
Description: The total sample size represented by an analysis result.
